title: Hexxed's Movement Expansion (DISCONTINUED)
description: A movement mod that offers dashing and double jumping as well as a couple more enchants.
body:
## Hexxed's Movement Expansion

### THIS MOD HAS BEEN DISCONTINUED.


This mod brings the ability to dash, and double jump! You still take fall damage, so to counter that, I made two new advancement. They are only obtainable in the enchant table, or found naturally; on armor already. They do **NOT** have a enchanted book. These two enchants are - Grounded, and Gravity's Bane.

### Grounded
This enchant is a curse. It prevents you from double jumping as long as you are wearing it. I couldnt get it to prevent you from dashing, but that may come in future versions. It cannot be paired with Gravity's Bane.

### Gravity's Bane
This enchant is a very OP enchant. It is pretty rare to get. It completely negates all fall damage. There is no height limit. These can only be put on boots, and cannot be paired with feather falling. 

### Dashing
By default the keybind is set to C. This can be changed in the controls, in the movement section. This move shoots you in the direction you look. It can shoot you up, left, right, down, etc.

### Double Jumping
By default the keybind is set to Space. You can change this on the other hand, to what you prefer!
### Extra
This mod does not have any settings for you to change other than the keybinds. There are only 4 features (The 2 enchants and the 2 moves.) but will change in future versions. This was released on 11/29/2025. I am not accepting donations at this time, but may in the future. This mod does work on servers, because the dashing and double jumping are all client sided, and only affects the players dashing and double jumping.

## Enjoy the mod!




_This is my very first project. Therefore may be in beta for a while!_

_Made in MCreator_
